Phoenix's Trusted HVAC Experts Since 2002

Don't sweat it. Cool comfort, delivered fast.

When the summer heat hits, you don't have time to wait. Our family-owned team gets your AC back online the same day — with honest pricing, factory-trained technicians, and a satisfaction guarantee that's earned us thousands of loyal Phoenix homeowners.

What We Do

Complete HVAC services for every Phoenix home & business

From a noisy condenser at midnight to a brand-new high-efficiency system installation — we handle it all under one roof, with one crew you can trust.

Most Popular

AC Repair

Cool air today — not next week. We diagnose and fix any make or model, usually in a single visit, with honest flat-rate pricing.

Learn more

AC Installation

High-efficiency Trane, Carrier, and American Standard systems sized correctly for Phoenix heat. Free in-home estimates and rebate filing.

Learn more

AC Tune-Up & Maintenance

Avoid summer breakdowns and lower your utility bill. Our 22-point inspection keeps your unit running cold, efficient, and warrantied.

Learn more

Heating Repair

Furnaces, heat pumps, and ductless systems — repaired by experienced techs. We carry common parts in the truck for one-trip fixes.

Learn more

Heat Pump & Furnace Install

New heating systems engineered for local winters and energy savings. Manufacturer warranties up to 10 years.

Learn more

Duct Cleaning & Sealing

Breathe cleaner air and slash your cooling bill by up to 30%. We clean, seal, and reroute ducts for top airflow performance.

Learn more
Explore all services
Why Phoenix Trusts Us

Family-owned. Phoenix-grown. Built on word of mouth.

For more than 23 years, our company has quietly become the HVAC team that Phoenix homeowners refer their neighbors to. No call centers. No high-pressure sales. Just clean, uniformed technicians who diagnose the real problem, quote you fairly, and finish the job right the first time.

  • Over 15 years on-the-truck experience
  • A+ Better Business Bureau rating
  • 24/7 emergency service, 365 days a year
  • Clean, background-checked technicians
  • Family owned & locally operated
  • Competitive flat-rate pricing
  • Factory-authorized for Trane & Carrier
  • 100% satisfaction guarantee
Meet the team Request a quote
96%

Repeat & Referral Customers

Phoenix homeowners who'd hire us again and refer their friends.

How It Works

Booking service shouldn't be harder than the repair

Four simple steps — from your first phone call to ice-cold air blowing through every vent.

STEP 01

Call or Book Online

Tell us what's wrong — or what you'd like installed. We'll book a slot that works for your schedule, often the same day.

STEP 02

We Arrive On Time

Background-checked, uniformed technicians show up in a marked truck during your scheduled window. No surprises.

STEP 03

Honest Diagnosis & Quote

We diagnose the actual issue and explain it in plain English. You'll see the price upfront before any work begins.

STEP 04

Cool Comfort, Restored

We finish the job, clean up the workspace, and don't leave until you're satisfied. Then we back it up with a written warranty.

Customer Stories

Real Phoenix homeowners. Real reviews.

We've earned a 4.9 / 5 average across 180+ Google, BBB, and direct customer reviews — and we read every single one.

"I used this company for my own home about four years ago and had great service. When my rental's heater quit the day before New Year's Eve, they had a new unit placed and installed before midnight. Great job and great service."
RD
Robert D.Phoenix · Heating Replacement
"Very pleased with the service and enjoying my new unit. The service was prompt, personable and they cleaned up after themselves. Thanks!"
VB
Victoria B.Phoenix · New AC Install
"Service was OUTSTANDING. Very professional. The tech explained things easily and did an excellent job. Just a GREAT company — highly recommend!"
CB
Carol B.Phoenix · AC Repair

FAQs

Answers to your most common questions

Don't see what you're looking for? Just call us at (602) 773-5522 — we're happy to chat.

In most cases we can dispatch a technician the same day — often within a few hours. We answer the phone 24/7, including weekends and holidays, because HVAC issues don't take a break and neither do we.
A small diagnostic fee covers the trip and a thorough inspection. If you approve the repair, we apply that fee toward the work. New system estimates are always free.
We service every major make and model. We're an authorized repair company for Trane, Carrier, York, American Standard, and Day & Night, but we also fix Lennox, Goodman, Rheem, Bryant, Amana, and more.
Most full residential system replacements wrap up in a single day. Larger or more complex jobs occasionally roll into a second day, but we keep the home livable in the meantime — and we never leave a job site unfinished.
Yes. We partner with multiple lenders to offer flexible monthly payments — including 0% promotional plans on qualifying systems. Ask your technician for current options when you book.
Absolutely. Repairs come with a written labor warranty, and new equipment carries the manufacturer's warranty. We stand behind every job — no fine print, no runaround.
Free Estimates · 24/7 Service

Get a same-day visit from a Phoenix-based technician who actually answers the phone. Honest pricing, factory-trained crews, and a satisfaction guarantee on every job.
